headline: Charles River Joins Lilly TuneLab to Optimize AI/ML Platform through Nonclinical Testing Expertise
summary: WILMINGTON, Mass., June 18, 2026--Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) announced a collaboration with Lilly TuneLab, a collaborative AI/ML drug discovery platform created by Eli Lilly and Company (Lilly).
